08],[247,533,1776533663923],[246,533,1776533663934],[245,533,1776533663948],[244,533,1776533663991],[243,533,1776533664019],[242,532,1776533664028],[242,532,1776533664280],[243,532,1776533664300],[246,532,1776533664313],[253,532,1776533664327],[263,533,1776533664339],[274,536,1776533664350],[283,538,1776533664361],[290,541,1776533664374],[293,542,1776533664392],[294,542,1776533664408],[294,542,1776533664420],[293,542,1776533664430],[293,541,1776533664468],[294,541,1776533664474],[294,540,1776533664500],[294,539,1776533664513],[294,538,1776533664528],[293,537,1776533664555],[293,536,1776533664569],[293,535,1776533664588],[293,534,1776533664598],[292,533,1776533664614],[291,532,1776533664630],[291,531,1776533664646],[292,531,1776533664656],[292,532,1776533664668],[293,533,1776533664687],[293,534,1776533664703],[293,535,1776533664715]],"mm-mp":17.51394422310757,"md":[[295,542,1776533664482]],"md-mp":3882.5,"mu":[[295,542,1776533664602]],"mu-mp":3894.0},"v":1,"tc":{}}
